name: Okta: Agents, Agent Pools, and Host Servers
description: Lists Okta agents, their associated agent pools, and the AD servers hosting each agent.
query:
MATCH path = (:Okta_Organization)-[:Okta_Contains]->(:Okta_AgentPool)<-[:Okta_AgentMemberOf|Okta_HostsAgent*1..2]-(agent)
WHERE agent:Okta_Agent OR agent:Computer
RETURN path
LIMIT 1000
